name: MJ Hegar
subject: our TV and digital ad strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texas is the nation's biggest battleground state, and that makes it expensive to run a campaign in.

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907ee/7f51f7bc/4ada190f/4ef02039/1646883445/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| |

---
Hi Peter -- We've been saying that Texas is the nation's biggest battleground state, and that makes it _expensive_ to run a campaign in. I have been hitting the campaign trail hard to meet as many voters as I can -- I've already traveled more than 11,000 miles! But Texas has 254 counties and 20 media markets -- so TV and digital ads will be another crucial way to spread our message and defeat Senator Cornyn.

We need to lock down our ad strategy, but the biggest variable is how much money we'll have to spend. Sen. Cornyn has nearly $11 million in the bank, and that will buy _a lot_ of airtime -- we have to be able to compete.

**So today I'm asking you to make a commitment to winning this campaign:[Will you become a Founding Donor of our Texas Airwaves Fund?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907ee/7f51f7bc/4ada190f/4ef02038/1646883445/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-adsfundnd?refcode=email_20200105.1nd__713__&amount=10&recurring=true") Your gift will be invaluable to helping us plan for the long term and build a winning campaign strategy.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Yang
subject: The current marijuana policy is incredibly stupid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Let’s change it together

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5562%2E377263%2EsGl2X6) Yang Gang --

Marijuana is now legal for adult use in 11 states and the District of Columbia. Thirty-three states have legalized medical marijuana in some form. But it is still considered a controlled substance by federal law -- like heroin and cocaine.

Thousands are in jail for marijuana-related offenses, particularly poor people and people of color. **Our current policy is both stupid and racist.**

Andrew has put forward a plan to resolve the ambiguity and legalize marijuana at the federal level. This would:
* Improve safety
* Increase social equity
* Generate tens of billions of dollars in new revenue based on legal cannabis businesses

[We need to put Humanity First by decriminalizing marijuana. If you agree, will you stand with Andrew by adding your name to this petition? ](https://act.yang2020.com/sign/email-marijuana-petition-20200105?source=email-20200105pm-all&t=6&akid=5562%2E377263%2EsGl2X6) | [Add Your Name](https://act.yang2020.com/sign/email-marijuana-petition-20200105?source=email-20200105pm-all&t=7&akid=5562%2E377263%2EsGl2X6)
---
Your support will send a message that, as a country, we’re ready to move past the outdated policies that make our country less fair and less safe.

Thanks for being part of the Yang Gang,

Team Yang
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21305?t=2&akid=5562%2E377263%2EsGl2X6)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=5562%2E377263%2EsGl2X6) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=5562%2E377263%2EsGl2X6) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: We need to hit our $700,000 goal or we won't be able to compete.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend, in a moment I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign. Let me explain:

[I announced that we needed to raise $700,000 by January 16th. We've made great progress, but we're not done yet. We have two weeks to raise another $309,730 to meet our goal. Will you help us close the gap and stay competitive?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976ee9/405157013/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976ee8/405157013/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
It's no secret that I've been an underdog in this race.

So far, we've gotten by on a shoestring budget by being smart and scrappy.

[But without funds for more TV and digital advertising, more field staff, and a direct mail program, we cannot compete with the billionaires flooding the airwaves and building on the ground.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976ee9/405157013/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Friend, I know that our path to victory runs through New Hampshire, where 67% of Democratic voters say they're still undecided.

As other candidates have left the race or stumbled in the last few weeks, we have doubled down and gained momentum.

My team and I have put together an aggressive plan to reach the two-thirds of undecided voters there through paid media--including digital advertising, direct mail, and TV--as well as expanding our organizing and outreach programs.

Core to this strategy are our 50 New Hampshire town halls (we already have 30 under our belt!) and a new ad series to introduce our campaign to the many voters who are just tuning in to this race.

_But friend, this is going to be expensive, and I can 't rely on a billionaire's bank account._

[The only way we can continue this program and compete in New Hampshire is by hitting our $700,000 goal before January 16th.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976ee9/405157013/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[I need your help to have more than just a fighting chance. Can you chip in $5 to our New Hampshire Investment Strategy to ensure our campaign has the funds we need by January 16?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976ee9/405157013/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [RUSH $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976eef/405157013/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [RUSH $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976ee8/405157013/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [RUSH $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976eed/405157013/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [RUSH $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976eec/405157013/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[We will win this race by reaching out to the vast majority of undecided voters who are looking for a candidate who will beat Donald Trump and build opportunity for the next generation.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976ee9/405157013/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**I 'm counting on this team to step up and fuel our campaign to victory. I know we can do it with your help. Will you chip in $5 (or whatever you can afford) right now to our New Hampshire Investment Strategy?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba87f/134673f2/8b37b15/69976ee9/405157013/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thank you,

Michael

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Our Health Care Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Let's fix this together
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13624480/141773548/-1907457918?refcode=01062020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTZhODc3Zi04YzMwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-yLdNx2-oYMZ4uNlus3m3yUy7joDk3miDAmCSWtUK4=)
---
Hi Friend, When it comes to health care, Texas leads the nation in all the wrong ways. We have the highest overall uninsured rate and the highest uninsured rate for kids. Both are more than double the national average. And while rural health care is in crisis nationwide, it's hitting us hardest right here at home. Milam County's two hospitals closed in 2018. Robertson County has only one doctor, Falls County only two. The uninsured rate in our rural counties can exceed 20%. Pete Sessions' position on health care is the same as it has been for a decade. He wants to "repeal and replace" the ACA. He tried that in 2016 and failed - because he doesn't have a replacement. Expanding coverage to all of us through a public option to buy in to Medicare while preserving our option to keep our current insurance is a smart investment in our future. Healthier kids make better students. Healthy adults are more productive in the workplace. Getting people covered will ease the rural health care crisis and will bring down overall costs by giving us all access to preventative care. **We can make this happen together, but I need to ask passionate folks like you, friend, to chip in $5, $10, or even $20 to win in November. clean_body: Let's fix this together | = Hi Friend, When it comes to health care, Texas leads the nation in all the wrong ways. We have the highest overall uninsured rate and the highest uninsured rate for kids. Both are more than double the national average. And while rural health care is in crisis nationwide, it's hitting us hardest right here at home. Milam County's two hospitals closed in 2018. Robertson County has only one doctor, Falls County only two. The uninsured rate in our rural counties can exceed 20%. Pete Sessions' position on health care is the same as it has been for a decade. He wants to "repeal and replace" the ACA. He tried that in 2016 and failed - because he doesn't have a replacement. Expanding coverage to all of us through a public option to buy in to Medicare while preserving our option to keep our current insurance is a smart investment in our future. Healthier kids make better students. Healthy adults are more productive in the workplace. Getting people covered will ease the rural health care crisis and will bring down overall costs by giving us all access to preventative care. We can make this happen together, but I need to ask passionate folks like you, friend, to chip in $5, $10, or even $20 to win in November. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

Talk soon, Team Charles _\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Charles Booker
Date: Sun, Jan 5, 2020
Subject: It’s official: I’m running for Senate to defeat Mitch McConnell._ I just got off the stage, and it’s official, folks: **I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Kentucky to defeat Mitch McConnell.** ******[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13633087/141845781/1564576560?refcode=cb2020106-nd_b2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRjNzEzZC1hNzMwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mv5Yhtpjy5djRo1OYWdwKTlmw8WWzVmTvVbxw8GZZZM=)****** This announcement is a bold statement of our faith as Kentuckians and Americans. It is a declaration that we understand that nothing will change unless we stand together and lead for it. It gives me hope to hear voices from across Kentucky, who have been ignored for so long, speak up and say they are ready to fight back. subject: Thank you for joining our campaign – we’re so glad to have you on the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Mike is running for President to get big things done and solve tough problems. That starts with creating more good-paying jobs and providing quality health care for every American. It also means reducing gun violence, fighting climate change, fixing our broken immigration system, and raising taxes on wealthy individuals – like Mike – to make the economy work for everyone.

We can rebuild our country – and make it fairer and better. And Mike is ready to get working and once again bring people together to find meaningful and lasting solutions to the big, important challenges that we face.

That’s the true spirit of this country – and the time to act is now.

Here are three ways you can get involved right now:

1\. Join us on social media: [Facebook](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=f1a6b85836&e=f54746ec54), [Twitter](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=e5ff31335e&e=f54746ec54), and [Instagram](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=fb8fb90b96&e=f54746ec54).
2\. Say you're in and sign up to volunteer [here](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=13c5d84c15&e=f54746ec54).
3\. Forward this email to a friend and tell them why Mike is running.

More soon but in the meantime, let's roll up our sleeves and get to work.

Thanks for being a part of this right from the beginning,

Team Bloomberg 2020

This year, we’re going to visit all 39 counties in our district -- not just once, but multiple times. We’re going to the small towns that haven’t seen a federal candidate in decades, stopping into coffee shops and gas stations, and touring farms and ethanol plants to ensure that no one is written off and no one is forgotten. J.D. wants to be a representative that hears directly from the people about what’s happening on the ground so he can best serve his constituents in Congress. That’s why every vote matters to us, and why J.D. wants to meet with as many people as he can.

For too long, the folks in Iowa’s 4th district have been silenced and ignored by Steve King, who puts himself before the needs of our district. **J.D. is different.** He’s the candidate who won’t stop working to make sure our farmers have a level playing field, our schools are well-funded and our teachers are well-paid, and our healthcare is affordable and accessible to everyone.

We have lots of exciting news coming up. Keep an eye out for endorsements, events, and campaign merchandise!

2020 is going to be a great year -- because of supporters like you.

**[Make a $5 or larger monthly donation to make this the year we defeat Steve King and elect J.D. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b75d/18e32a7f/50d07c56/7b228596/4251215185/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b75d/18e32a7f/50d07c56/7b228597/4251215185/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. name: Booker HQ
subject: One of my favorite emails to write
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I asked our analytics team to pull some stats, and I'm super excited about what they found, so I'm writing to share some numbers with all of you: Hey there, Catherine here! And I have a special treat for you. But before I get to it, please consider **[chipping in to help us start out 2020 strong.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200106_BHQ_20200106-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** With the new year, we're starting a brand new fundraising quarter, which means it's time to look back at how we did in the last three months. I asked our analytics team to pull some stats, and I'm SO excited about what they found, I just had to share it with you:
1. We had the best fundraising quarter of the campaign to date, raising **over $6.6 million** in the months from October to December.

2. We saw a groundswell of new support come in throughout the quarter -- we received contributions from **over 70,000 (71,850 to be exact!) new donors.** And what's even more exciting -- _96% of people who chipped in for the very first time did so via our online fundraising program!_

3. Our campaign is heavily powered by small grassroots contributions -- **99% of all of our contributions for the quarter were under $200.**

4. We also had some big moments -- **of our top ten best online fundraising days of the campaign, five were in Q4.**

5. And this was all with an average online donation of **$22.98.**

Team, it's clear that momentum is on our side. Now, we have to keep up. The Iowa caucuses are less than one month away, and we need to give this everything we've got. **[Will you chip in to start the first quarter of 2020 strong and power us all the way through the new year?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200106_BHQ_20200106-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Let's go,
Catherine Catherine Gabel
Online Fundraising Director
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200106_BHQ_20200106-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Healthcare for millions could be at risk this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, The Affordable Care Act (ACA) is at risk of being torn up by the Trump administration after a federal appeals court ruled the individual mandate \-- the backbone of the law \-- unconstitutional. Trump immediately hailed the ruling as a victory for Americans, because he does not care about Americans not named Trump. The GOP has repeatedly tried to trash the ACA before going as far as shutting down the federal government in 2013 and trying to repeal it in 2017 with no replacement, but all of their efforts have failed when Americans made their voices heard and demanded it stay. But this lawsuit could gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions without taking the will of the people into account, so if you believe we need to protect healthcare \-- not let Trump and the courts strip it away from millions \-- we need you to make your voice heard again today: **[Demand Congress save the Affordable Care Act >>](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf3d/6e9863e8/17850d3f/1db04ad4/2089114280/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/0adYedpE")** Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf3d/6e9863e8/17850d3f/1db04adb/2089114280/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200106a.ND&refcode2=bGoFb6op9Znq9v5XC8rb")

subject: Our 2020 Electoral Strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Please read this important update from my campaign manager Brad Parscale. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=880f8ce21feb780e1949bafb5c9734133020c010d74379d5c6fc1c28bcbd754e8ce2c30fc9787772d18789dc121ead03af7c5cf56ef406b1)
---

Friend,

I want to share this important memo that my campaign manager, Brad Parscale, has put together about our winning strategy for 2020.

_I 've highlighted the key points that you NEED to know._

---
**[Once you read the memo, please consider making a contribution of ANY AMOUNT to help us win in November and Keep America Great.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=880f8ce21feb780e85e8ac266c6020622df0be6c43fc38b6f50c50bbb5c8c82c9ce6a528d840f89ec4cffe0d2affd0d6a9174292d1ae8dca)**
---

**BEFORE donating, you 'll also be able to indicate your preference for the state you would prefer to see us invest your contribution in.**
TO: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=880f8ce21feb780e47761db15295120302aace2edb9c1a6fd5f2972cdd77afd758f1b4aa64169e233a04b55d5a84c277d3bee6dbf483c0dc)**
FROM: Brad Parscale
RE: Donald Trump's Path to 270 Electoral Votes in 2020
________________________________________

Despite all the fake polls and so-called "experts" telling us it was impossible, we CRUSHED Crooked Hillary Clinton by winning 306 electoral votes in 2016.

We were able to flip SIX states that Barack Obama won in 2012 from blue to red while not letting Hillary win a single 2012 red state.

Our winning strategy that helped flip Wisconsin, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Ohio, Florida, and Iowa was simple: **we outworked the other side.**

Democrats hadn't lost Wisconsin, Michigan, or Pennsylvania in nearly three decades, and Hillary was so confident in her "blue wall" that she didn't even bother to campaign there.

The latest 2020 polls show that we are in a VERY good position to win big again next November. Democrats' impeachment scam is DEEPLY unpopular among swing-state voters, and Nancy Pelosi seems quite content to lead her party off a cliff this year.

We aren't taking a single state for granted. We have volunteers in all 50 states working tirelessly to ensure another Trump victory and helping to Keep America Great in 2020.

Our priority right now is trying to widen the map and expand our path to victory in 2020. We will be VERY competitive in Minnesota, Nevada, Colorado, New Hampshire, Maine, New Mexico, and Virginia in addition to the 30 states we won in 2016. [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=880f8ce21feb780e63657795b7da4a888d63b2be3b241b4d15e020548fc98a27b5dd1af71203f2c0ef4b00783a3d50046adc2bc52e0e68ad)In order to contend in these swing-states, we're going to need substantial financial resources to support our ads, rallies, and get-out-the-vote efforts.

________________________________________

---
| Since you're one of my most trusted supporters, I want to give YOU the option to indicate which state you would prefer to see us invest your contribution in.

**[Contribute NOW and select which 2020 swing-state YOU think your contributions would help the most.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=08e4da87b4bd249dd19625cfb66f19d942dbf36ac3e86b03c8dd18b40f1379e9d16e7a946cc5dca9dd2f3243fd5c1e952d3cffca38cc52e0)**
[CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2a46c6df27e9008062c9134a3fb30fc54f3b66b68f26c241e6310778bb6ce43843c40f94492981bb5f4688a74391c93ca6d69221f87a09c3) [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2a46c6df27e90080ca1460bb146a68eb99258a3972990e0dbc2cba78198958282d3d604af9731177d748fa7749fb4d59f52a469d67690f6b) [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2a46c6df27e90080b42be45cc6a429443ab9a63eceb198d6640bd19aca87ca044afd1b5f9ead22bdc528e8e279045c96aea8e7a2763fca1b) [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2a46c6df27e90080b9174a3be30072738015fb6801fcfdc0a6b91ffbe2398e705175569806438d9a24e15a2a16a442bccd1c9ccc3b151a9b) [CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2a46c6df27e900806a626690a8908f97fd76c22a291a1eb2aed27b70e506d1e37a1c3b9d4d63f646132a3aa4577b56ba3f241412caaf2486) Thank you,
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2a46c6df27e900800503ed56aa392ccd7c03ed90eda82c6570570b5275217bca81e847d21ece4c7435e41bec290b7bfbd8ee475b6de06975)
Donald J. Trump

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: My endorsement for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97b/3eb3e2fc/6a04f9e2/744ea7e8/1185139298/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20200106_em_castro_endorsement&source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement")
---
| | Friend, When I suspended my campaign for president, I said that I wasn't done fighting for what I believe in. I'm so proud of the campaign we built together--fighting for the most vulnerable people, standing up for immigrants and people who are poor, and working towards an America where everyone counts. The American people need a champion in Washington who will be a president for everyone. Someone who's unafraid to fight like hell to make the big changes we need in the years ahead. [_That 's why today I'm proud to endorse Senator Elizabeth Warren for President of the United States. Please take a moment to watch my announcement video and then add your name to say you're ready to continue fighting alongside me and Elizabeth for a better future. _](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97b/3eb3e2fc/6a04f9e2/744ea7d7/1185139298/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-join-julian-and-elizabeth-em?source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+today+Irsquom+proud+to+en&utm_campaign=20200106_em_castro_endorsement") | [](my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-join-julian-and-elizabeth-em?source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement)
---

Senator Warren and I share a bold vision for the future--an America where no matter who you are or where you live, you can find good housing, your kids can get a good education, and you can have good job opportunities.

I've seen firsthand her commitment to this vision. We both served in the Obama administration, we worked alongside one another to boost housing opportunity while I was at HUD, and I've been so impressed with how hardworking and groundbreaking her campaign has been.

Elizabeth knows that big change doesn't come by playing it safe or doing it alone.

We need a grassroots movement to take on the special interests in Washington, and a president who will push for big, structural change.

Elizabeth has a plan for that, and I'm ready to join her to get it done. _[If you're ready to continue fighting alongside me and Elizabeth, please add your name so I know you're with us.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97b/3eb3e2fc/6a04f9e2/744ea7d6/1185139298/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-join-julian-and-elizabeth-em?source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+If+yoursquore+ready+to+continue+fighting&utm_campaign=20200106_em_castro_endorsement")_

My grandmother came here as an orphan from Mexico when she was seven-years-old. She worked her entire life as a maid, a cook, and a babysitter to provide for her family--and just two generations later, one of her grandsons is a Congressman, and I was a candidate for President of the United States. That's the promise of America.

Elizabeth will fight for that promise because she's lived the American Dream. She grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class in Oklahoma. She's the daughter of a janitor, and she went on to become a public school teacher, law professor, public servant, a US Senator, and she's the best person to be the next president.

Both of us were blessed with the kind of opportunity we've had because we worked hard, our families worked hard, and because our country gave us a shot to succeed.

There's one candidate who I believe will make sure that shot is available to everybody in this country--that's Elizabeth Warren. And I'm asking you to believe in her too.

_[If you're still willing to fight for president who understands the struggles everyday Americans face, for a president who isn't afraid to take on the tough issues, for a president who will put people first, then I hope you'll add your name to join us.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97b/3eb3e2fc/6a04f9e2/744ea7d5/1185139298/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-join-julian-and-elizabeth-em?source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+If+yoursquore+still+willing+to+fight+for&utm_campaign=20200106_em_castro_endorsement")_

Our fight for the future has just begun.

¡Juntos ganaremos! Together, we will win!

For the Future,
Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97b/3eb3e2fc/6a04f9e2/744ea7d4/1185139298/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20200106_em_castro_endorsement&source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97b/3eb3e2fc/6a04f9e2/744ea7d3/1185139298/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20200106_em_castro_endorsement&source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97b/3eb3e2fc/6a04f9e2/744ea7d2/1185139298/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=20200106_em_castro_endorsement&source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97b/3eb3e2fc/6a04f9e2/744ea7d1/1185139298/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20200106_em_castro_endorsement&source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97b/3eb3e2fc/6a04f9e2/744ea7d0/1185139298/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=20200106_em_castro_endorsement&source=20200106_em_castro_endorsement"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

I'm so proud of the campaign we built together--fighting for the most vulnerable people, standing up for immigrants and people who are poor, and working towards an America where everyone counts. The American people need a champion in Washington who will be a president for everyone. Someone who's unafraid to fight like hell to make the big changes we need in the years ahead. "" | my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-join-julian-and-elizabeth-em?source=20200106emcastroendorsement Senator Warren and I share a bold vision for the future--an America where no matter who you are or where you live, you can find good housing, your kids can get a good education, and you can have good job opportunities. I've seen firsthand her commitment to this vision. We both served in the Obama administration, we worked alongside one another to boost housing opportunity while I was at HUD, and I've been so impressed with how hardworking and groundbreaking her campaign has been. Elizabeth knows that big change doesn't come by playing it safe or doing it alone. We need a grassroots movement to take on the special interests in Washington, and a president who will push for big, structural change. Elizabeth has a plan for that, and I'm ready to join her to get it done. "" My grandmother came here as an orphan from Mexico when she was seven-years-old. She worked her entire life as a maid, a cook, and a babysitter to provide for her family--and just two generations later, one of her grandsons is a Congressman, and I was a candidate for President of the United States. That's the promise of America. Elizabeth will fight for that promise because she's lived the American Dream. She grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class in Oklahoma. She's the daughter of a janitor, and she went on to become a public school teacher, law professor, public servant, a US Senator, and she's the best person to be the next president. Both of us were blessed with the kind of opportunity we've had because we worked hard, our families worked hard, and because our country gave us a shot to succeed. There's one candidate who I believe will make sure that shot is available to everybody in this country--that's Elizabeth Warren. And I'm asking you to believe in her too. "" Our fight for the future has just begun. ¡Juntos ganaremos! Together, we will win! For the Future, Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Democrats and Iran
body:
"President Trump’s order to take out Qasem Soleimani was morally, constitutionally and strategically correct." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c996d3220e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Democrats and Iran**

“President Trump’s order to take out Qasem Soleimani was morally, constitutionally and strategically correct. It deserves more bipartisan support than the begrudging or negative reactions it has received thus far from my fellow Democrats,” former Sen. Joe Lieberman (D-CT) writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

A few of the most important points:
* During the Iraq War, Soleimani oversaw three camps that trained and equipped Iraqi militias. These fighters have killed more than 600 Americans since 2003.

* “Some Democrats have said that killing Soleimani will lead us into war with Iran. In fact, Soleimani and the Quds Force have been at war with the U.S. for years. It is more likely that his death will diminish the chances of a wider conflict.”

* “Authority to act quickly to eliminate a threat to the U.S. is inherent in the powers granted to the president by the Constitution.”

Lieberman says Democrats should leave partisan politics at “the water’s edge” and “stand together against Iran and dangerous leaders like Qasem Soleimani.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=94261c0241&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “In Washington, the decision to kill Mr. Suleimani represents the final demise of Mr. Obama’s Middle East strategy, which sought to realign American interests with those of Iran,” Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Michael Doran writes in [_The New York Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6620bed567&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Four years ago, then-Secretary of State John Kerry acknowledged that some of the $150 billion given to Iran in President Obama’s nuclear deal would end up in terrorist hands. “I think that some of it will end up in the hands of the IRGC or other entities, some of which are labeled terrorists,” he conceded in an interview, Elise Labott reported for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5457e5859&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Soleimani had the blood of hundreds of Americans on his hands, and was in the Iraqi capital of Baghdad planning attacks on more Americans throughout the Middle East . . . Members of Congress make statements; presidents take action. And Trump’s action will make the world safer for Americans,” security expert Christian Whiton writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f20d386f86&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm deeply grateful to receive Julián Castro's endorsement today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I admired the campaign that Julian Castro ran, and I'll continue to fight for our vision of justice and opportunity -- where everyone gets the chance to succeed and thrive. I paid close attention... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9d1/45c30650/1e9f2e125/66fc3d67/3063907631/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Julian Castro is a powerfully important voice for our country.

As a presidential candidate, he proposed bold and progressive policies -- including reforming our immigration laws, fixing our broken criminal justice system, improving access to child care, and protecting the rights and equality of people with disabilities.

He's made the Democratic primary more substantive, and his vision was always clear: Lift up the voices of the people who are struggling the most, and fight for deep, systemic reform.

**I 'm deeply grateful to receive his endorsement today. It is an honor to fight side by side with Julian Castro for the big, structural change we need.

We've got a lot to do in the last few weeks before the first caucuses and primaries. And our team is ready to make every single day count. But we can only reach every caucus-goer and voter we need to reach if grassroots donors continue to chip in.

[Will you join the fight alongside Julian Castro and me and make a contribution today to bring our campaign closer to victory?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9d1/45c30650/1e9f2e125/66fc3d68/3063907631/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjIxRl9SRVNfQlNDX0VfMjAyMDAxMDZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN21F_RES_BSC_E_20200106_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9d1/45c30650/1e9f2e125/66fc3d68/3063907631/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjIxRl9SRVNfQlNDX0VfMjAyMDAxMDZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN21F_RES_BSC_E_20200106_V1S2_P")

>
Julian and I both had the honor to serve in President Obama's administration, where we had the opportunity to work on a number of issues that touch people's lives.

And we both have succeeded because we got a shot at the American Dream.

Julian's grandmother, Victoria, came to the United States at seven years old. She never made it past the fourth grade, but worked hard to teach her family the value of hard work as she cleaned houses and worked as a maid. She passed on those values of hard work and perseverance to Julian's mother, who passed them on to Julian and his twin brother, Joaquin.

Both of us were blessed with the kind of opportunity we've had because we worked hard, our families worked hard, and also because our country gave us a shot to succeed.

Now, Julian and I are fighting side by side to ensure that families in our country today can have the same opportunity to achieve their dreams as ours did.

I admired the campaign that Julian Castro ran, and I'll continue to fight for our vision of justice and opportunity -- where everyone gets the chance to succeed and thrive.

I paid close attention to the big ideas he was adding to the race (I always appreciate when someone has a plan), and I was always glad to run into him on the trail, from debate stages to the Iowa Steak Fry.

Tomorrow, we'll come together again and speak at an event in New York City.

We'll talk about putting political and economic power in the hands of the people, where it belongs.

And we'll continue to fight to make it happen -- but we can't do it alone.

[**Please make a donation today to fight alongside me and Juli an Castro, and help make our government and our economy work for everyone -- not just a thin slice at the top.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9d1/45c30650/1e9f2e125/66fc3d68/3063907631/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjIxRl9SRVNfQlNDX0VfMjAyMDAxMDZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN21F_RES_BSC_E_20200106_V1S2_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: I admired the campaign that Julian Castro ran, and I'll continue to fight for our vision of justice and opportunity -- where everyone gets the chance to succeed and thrive. I paid close attention... | | | "" Julian Castro is a powerfully important voice for our country. As a presidential candidate, he proposed bold and progressive policies -- including reforming our immigration laws, fixing our broken criminal justice system, improving access to child care, and protecting the rights and equality of people with disabilities. He's made the Democratic primary more substantive, and his vision was always clear: Lift up the voices of the people who are struggling the most, and fight for deep, systemic reform. I 'm deeply grateful to receive his endorsement today. It is an honor to fight side by side with Julian Castro for the big, structural change we need. We've got a lot to do in the last few weeks before the first caucuses and primaries. And our team is ready to make every single day count. But we can only reach every caucus-goer and voter we need to reach if grassroots donors continue to chip in. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Julian and I both had the honor to serve in President Obama's administration, where we had the opportunity to work on a number of issues that touch people's lives. And we both have succeeded because we got a shot at the American Dream. Julian's grandmother, Victoria, came to the United States at seven years old. She never made it past the fourth grade, but worked hard to teach her family the value of hard work as she cleaned houses and worked as a maid. She passed on those values of hard work and perseverance to Julian's mother, who passed them on to Julian and his twin brother, Joaquin. Both of us were blessed with the kind of opportunity we've had because we worked hard, our families worked hard, and also because our country gave us a shot to succeed. Now, Julian and I are fighting side by side to ensure that families in our country today can have the same opportunity to achieve their dreams as ours did. I admired the campaign that Julian Castro ran, and I'll continue to fight for our vision of justice and opportunity -- where everyone gets the chance to succeed and thrive. I paid close attention to the big ideas he was adding to the race (I always appreciate when someone has a plan), and I was always glad to run into him on the trail, from debate stages to the Iowa Steak Fry. Tomorrow, we'll come together again and speak at an event in New York City. We'll talk about putting political and economic power in the hands of the people, where it belongs. And we'll continue to fight to make it happen -- but we can't do it alone. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

---

"Just the Truth" will share with voters Michael's personal story, experiences in leadership and service, and motivations underlying his run for president.

The first ad details his family story as both the son of his mother, a Holocaust survivor, and his father, a descendant of the Mayflower -- and how his uniquely American story has shaped his worldview and approach to public service.

[Most voters are still trying to decide which candidate is the best choice to take on Donald Trump. And that's why we think it's so critical that early state voters see this ad to know why Michael is the best choice to lead us forward.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba878/134673f2/8b5d398/69976e29/1399725158/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

That's why our New Hampshire Investment Strategy is so crucial. We're launching a paid media program to get Michael's message out, and he's meeting undecided voters where they are by hosting 50 town halls in the final weeks before the primary (with 31 under our belt already!).

When voters start to make up their minds, Michael will be there.

[The success of this campaign hinges on reaching this crucial fundraising goal, and we can't afford to take our foot off the gas!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba878/134673f2/8b5d398/69976e29/1399725158/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

subject: You won't believe it

body:
Thank you. Over the past few weeks, we've asked our supporters for a lot to help us reach our end of year fundraising goal. The response has been incredible and I'm humbled to tell you that our campaign has raised over $488,000 so far this election. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.2y6/1cw3f-S-Toa8r-r__G6dfA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpfMrFCZvnYopbISW-2FKFBxPXrzsUr0DQbbvJuc0XuZsPUNSA2ssqShQQ1Mn07EF5PwAu7g66-2Bdd1j27a7wvecp8Q7Gx1b7yMZHBAe5vT3P5coSfeDCwg3KvdhzcDaAyjYg9ud3ttREUNKFBeelZ2yuZFUoa89w9CZ7Dujc5XlVv0m4b4hglrYjzyAoBAWMZ8ag-3D/8x92)
Friend, **** **** **Thank you**. Over the past couple of months, we've asked our supporters for a lot to help us reach our end-of-year fundraising goal. The response has been incredible and I'm humbled to tell you that our campaign has raised **_over $488,000 so far in this election_**. As of now, that’s more than any other campaign in our race.
Did you know I’m one of only two candidates in this race not accepting corporate PAC money? When I tell people that, they usually say two things. First, they're shocked that most of the candidates in a Democratic primary have refused to pledge that they won't be bought by corporate interests. Second, they ask, "How can you raise the money you need to be successful?”
**The answer is through supporters like you.**
But we can’t let our fundraising slow down now. _Will you contribute today to help us win this ultra-competitive race?_
[Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.2y6/1cw3f-S-Toa8r-r__G6dfA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJrj2D3nB4oaGPLCZprE1dMXzJcmbXMNijjsUgjPlK7gNHsvtHsMPW9bwrPsi4HVSYPTQ-2FIF-2BPb6uBLjPyOrlpZgPI0rWbNI2rfVClb72bJxc-2F5qvW-2BWQEOn9jtCEiv5QZ4hYw1GPWL7JWX7Y9uY9jrHHeMxm-2FDepC6SrVk8WUQBZqlUtTE4OJDOymucp9ufLJ0-3D/i481)
We don't need to be bankrolled by corporations when we have literally thousands of everyday people on our side pitching in.

**We need to start 2020 off strong. Experts say that we need to raise a million dollars to win a congressional primary, and ours is just a few months away. We’re launching our field program this week and continuing to grow our campaign. We need to ramp up our fundraising even more to compete with our opponents funded by corporations.**
[Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/0wA/ni0YAA/t.2y6/1cw3f-S-Toa8r-r__G6dfA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpWg44RcP-2Ft6WD2hPimSjkLy5Kh7CUbLboobeMtk13yVPDJG1AVULWQP1HHsD0pSLVK-2BgMAcEB73GUlhHPLFSt-2FK3DbiOUoGkR08vQB9o81cwQ7KbQlsTs0UtBgNT09bb7ejl0JImSkkvQmPI39p3PR-2BDOwjYsTpYErgwETY23XFA0ezZqMkmJ-2BNia-2BWtjgsC0-3D/SQDk)
The progress we've made in the last six months has been breathtaking. None of it would be possible without supporters like you. **But we're just getting started.** We're ready to start knocking on doors and talking with every voter in our district. clean_body: Thank you. Over the past few weeks, we've asked our supporters for a lot to help us reach our end of year fundraising goal. The response has been incredible and I'm humbled to tell you that our campaign has raised over $488,000 so far this election. | | | Friend, ** Thank you. Over the past couple of months, we've asked our supporters for a lot to help us reach our end-of-year fundraising goal. The response has been incredible and I'm humbled to tell you that our campaign has raised over $488,000 so far in this election. As of now, that’s more than any other campaign in our race. Did you know I’m one of only two candidates in this race not accepting corporate PAC money? When I tell people that, they usually say two things. First, they're shocked that most of the candidates in a Democratic primary have refused to pledge that they won't be bought by corporate interests. Second, they ask, "How can you raise the money you need to be successful?” The answer is through supporters like you. But we can’t let our fundraising slow down now. Will you contribute today to help us win this ultra-competitive race? We don't need to be bankrolled by corporations when we have literally thousands of everyday people on our side pitching in. We need to start 2020 off strong. Experts say that we need to raise a million dollars to win a congressional primary, and ours is just a few months away. We’re launching our field program this week and continuing to grow our campaign. We need to ramp up our fundraising even more to compete with our opponents funded by corporations. The progress we've made in the last six months has been breathtaking. None of it would be possible without supporters like you. But we're just getting started. We're ready to start knocking on doors and talking with every voter in our district. Together, we're going to fight for and win the change working people so desperately need. Sincerely, Mondaire ** | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . name: New York Times Climate Update (via 314)
subject: This is urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
|
[](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/support-pro-science-candidates?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2") We must take action now: | | [YES!](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/support-pro-science-candidates?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+YES&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2")
---
* * *
The most recent science is clear:

[Everyday weather now has a detectable "fingerprint" from anthropogenic climate change.](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/support-pro-science-candidates?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Everyday+weather+now+has+a+detectable+ld&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2")

This means that extreme weather events -- from the fires in Australia to extreme flooding worldwide -- can be linked to our failure to act.

**This is only going to get worse and endanger more communities and lives.**

But, this is where you come in.

[Will you add your name and pledge that you're ready to stand up to climate change and extreme weather by supporting pro-science candidates?](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/support-pro-science-candidates?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Will+you+add+your+name+and+pledge+that+y&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2")
| [TAKE THE PLEDGE](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/support-pro-science-candidates?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+TAKE+THE+PLEDGE&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2")
---
Our government will only take action to fight these brutal effects of climate change, if they see that thousands of us are ready to join them. That's why we need at least 15,000 people to sign on.

**If you want to be one of the 15,000 to sign on, then click the link below.**

[https://secure.314action.org/SupportPro-ScienceCandidates](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/support-pro-science-candidates?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+httpssecure314actionorgSupportProScience&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2")

Thank you,

314 Action Team

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb43f3/4bd7760e/461bd5b2/77acd33b/233173873/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0NjFiZDViMiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0M2YzIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/461bd5b2/29bb43f3?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb43f3/4bd7760e/461bd5b2/77acd33a/233173873/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30DO30DNTL_200106_1_2")** to make a donation.

name: SaraGideon.com
body:
What do you say?
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e50/4bef7a87/6ae153b4/287f9a95/83557622/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
If you knew that $3 would bring us one step closer to replacing Susan Collins in the United States Senate, would you contribute it?
If you knew that a $3 contribution would bring us one step closer to a Senate that prioritizes people over the profits of the drug companies and fossil fuel industry, would you do it?
If you knew that just $3 would bring us step closer to not having to worry about the next Brett Kavanaugh being confirmed to the Supreme Court, would it be worth it?
$3.
It may not seem like the kind of money that wins or loses elections.
But when we add up all of those $3 contributions, we're going to have what it takes to beat Susan Collins, no matter how much Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell raise for her.
So what do you say? Will you take that step with Sara Gideon today? There's only one way we win this election: together.
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign for Senate today? Help us take the next step toward beating Susan Collins and electing a Senate that represents all of us.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e50/4bef7a87/6ae153b4/287f9a94/83557622/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200106-full")
This is going to be an extraordinarily close race. No doubt about it. And every single donation, every volunteer shift, every social media post will matter. All those steps, together, will make the difference.
Take the next one with Sara. Chip in today.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e50/4bef7a87/6ae153b4/287f9a94/83557622/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200106-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e50/4bef7a87/6ae153b4/287f9a6b/83557622/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e50/4bef7a87/6ae153b4/287f9a6a/83557622/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e50/4bef7a87/6ae153b4/287f9a69/83557622/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639023d/55b66746/2df3715b/80fa98b/549437918/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | We closed out 2019 strong -- and it was only possible because of your help. Lots of campaigns ask for money in these emails, and of course, we do too. But we've prided ourselves on being a different kind of campaign. So, we want to make sure you are among the first to know our quarter four numbers -- and exactly how the contributions received were spent. **_[We're going to ask you to make your first contribution to our campaign in just a minute. But first, we want to show you why your contribution is so important.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639023d/55b66746/2df3715b/80fa994/549437918/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-06-q4&recurring=1&amount=3")_** **Over the course of quarter four we raised $2.4 million dollars.** [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639023d/55b66746/2df3715b/80fa994/549437918/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-06-q4&recurring=1&amount=3") **We opened three new field offices because we need to meet voters where they are.** We are ensuring that folks all across Massachusetts have the opportunity to organize, volunteer, and find community near them. **We understand the importance of hiring the best staff out there.** We have built a robust communication and digital team to make sure that everyone sees Joe's message in the news and online. We are hiring strong field staff, ensuring that we have the infrastructure to organize, recruit volunteers, and get out the vote. **Joe believes the first job of a U.S. Senator should be showing up.** Over the course of 90 days, Joe visited 70 towns and cities. Listening. Learning. Hearing from those he is seeking to represent all across Massachusetts. Contributions to this campaign helped put the gas in the car so Joe could go out and meet voters where they are. Just yesterday, Joe kicked off the year with a 14-stop town hall tour in 30 days. How exciting is that? So now, circling back on the question we mentioned earlier... **[We're building something special here. Knowing what you know now, will you consider contributing to our campaign for the first time?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639023d/55b66746/2df3715b/80fa994/549437918/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-06-q4&recurring=1&amount=3")** [Contribute](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639023d/55b66746/2df3715b/80fa994/549437918/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-06-q4&recurring=1&amount=3") Let's build this together. Thank you for being in this fight with us. _Team Kennedy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639023d/55b66746/2df3715b/80fa995/549437918/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639023d/55b66746/2df3715b/80fa996/549437918/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639023d/55b66746/2df3715b/80fa997/549437918/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639023d/55b66746/2df3715b/80fa990/549437918/VEsP/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: Signature needed (via algreen.org)
subject: Fwd: After impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/JHm36oZ7HGIB_9_XXBNbQ9gTbsi730zARwcRdzBaNLw=/gQZd5ByAqcEYFRDFWTv0yQNtUHYIH-R3C9wZ5yvwxdk=)
---
Hey there, have you signed Al's petition yet? **President Trump abused his power for personal and political gain. The least the Senate can do now is investigate these charges seriously --_but several Republican Senators have already promised blind loyalty before the trial has even started._** **[The American people deserve better. Sign the petition to join Al in calling for a fair trial on impeachment charges! ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/JHm36oZ7HGIB_9_XXBNbQ9gTbsi730zARwcRdzBaNLw=/gQZd5ByAqcEYFRDFWTv0yQNtUHYIH-R3C9wZ5yvwxdk=)** | **[SIGN NOW ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/JHm36oZ7HGIB_9_XXBNbQ9gTbsi730zARwcRdzBaNLw=/gQZd5ByAqcEYFRDFWTv0yQNtUHYIH-R3C9wZ5yvwxdk=)**
---

* * *
**PREVIOUS MESSAGE:**
Folks,
My colleagues in the House voted to impeach President Trump for his corrupt power grabs and complete disregard for democratic processes. Now our case will proceed to the Senate -- **but before it 's even gotten there, Republican Senators have vowed to protect the President at all costs.**
[**The American people deserve a fair, fact-based trial of impeachment charges. If you agree, sign my petition to add your voice urging Senate Republicans to uphold their oaths of office and do right by the people!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/JHm36oZ7HGIB_9_XXBNbQ9gTbsi730zARwcRdzBaNLw=/gQZd5ByAqcEYFRDFWTv0yQNtUHYIH-R3C9wZ5yvwxdk=)
**[SIGN THE PETITION ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/JHm36oZ7HGIB_9_XXBNbQ9gTbsi730zARwcRdzBaNLw=/gQZd5ByAqcEYFRDFWTv0yQNtUHYIH-R3C9wZ5yvwxdk=)**
---
Impeaching the President was not a decision my colleagues and I took lightly -- but President Trump abused his office for personal gain, invited a foreign power to influence our elections, and repeatedly obstructed Congress' efforts to shed light on the truth.
**Now it 's on the Senate to consider these charges with the gravity they deserve, investigate to the best of their ability, and act in the best interests of the American people. [Join me and thousands of Americans in calling on Senator Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans to do the right thing and hold a fair trial on impeachment!](https://act.myngp.com/el/JHm36oZ7HGIB_9_XXBNbQ9gTbsi730zARwcRdzBaNLw=/gQZd5ByAqcEYFRDFWTv0yQNtUHYIH-R3C9wZ5yvwxdk=)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/JHm36oZ7HGIB_9_XXBNbQ9gTbsi730zARwcRdzBaNLw=/gQZd5ByAqcEYFRDFWTv0yQNtUHYIH-R3C9wZ5yvwxdk=)**
---

\-- Congressman Al Green

**[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/JHm36oZ7HGIB_9_XXBNbQ9gTbsi730zARwcRdzBaNLw=/iMNDMZ8ML0p3hZR0n5sb75wt3SG-XmYEongpGoM3gqs=?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=0106-senateimpeach)**
---

Keep Al Green in Congress
P.O. Box 56761
Houston TX 77256-6761 United States | Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress

name: update@nikkifosteroh.com
subject: a quick recap >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cef1/30a4f917/509d9ef5/28ce91ae/63966609/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")

| | Hi Team Nikki! After wrapping up 2019, we wanted to give you a quick update about our campaign. We officially filed our petition to get on the primary ballot! Check out this photo of Nikki turning in our signatures: - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | **On the Campaign Trail:**
---
Hi Team Nikki! After wrapping up 2019, we wanted to give you a quick update about our campaign. We officially filed our petition to get on the primary ballot! Check out this photo of Nikki turning in our signatures: **[](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_jan?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")** We had a meet and greet with voters in both Warren and Hamilton Counties! **[](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_jan?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")** **[](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_jan?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")** And Nikki spent time honoring her fellow veterans at a Veterans Day event in Green Township **[](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_jan?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")**
**On the Issues:**
Nikki is standing with immigrants who have only ever known the United States as their home, she knows that they're an important part of the fabric of our country. **[Will you join her in urging the Supreme Court to protect DACA?](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cef1/30a4f917/509d9ef5/28ce91a5/63966609/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=6+-+Will+you+join+her+in+urging+the+Supreme+&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")** | | **[Protect DACA](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cef1/30a4f917/509d9ef5/28ce91a4/63966609/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=7+-+Protect+DACA&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")**
---
Nikki has come out in favor of impeachment -- because she believes our leaders should be serving us, not themselves.
Steve Chabot has blindly defended Trump -- in every public comment, in private fundraising emails, and during the impeachment hearings. [**We hope you 'll join her in supporting Trump's impeachment -> **](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cef1/30a4f917/509d9ef5/28ce91a7/63966609/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_FR_200106_NewsletterB_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=8+-+We+hope+yoursquoll+join+her+in+supportin&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")
| [Add your name](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cef1/30a4f917/509d9ef5/28ce91a6/63966609/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_FR_200106_NewsletterB_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+Add+your+name&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")
---

**Fundraising Update:**
Nikki has been working hard to make sure our team has the resources we need to win this race. Thanks to her hard work, and your grassroots support, **we hit our end of year goal!** But we can't get complacent -- Steve Chabot has raked in millions from corporate PACs, and national Republicans have continued their attacks on Nikki, desperate to keep Ohio red. We can't let them win. [**Will you chip in to make sure we unseat Steve Chabot in November?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_jan?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=10+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+make+sure+we+unseat+&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_jan?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=11+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200106_Newsletter_U1_X1")

body:
It’s officially 2020 — that means it’s time to kick off the new legislative session with more results coming for Hoosiers. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8e89f1d3486e412c843c19c74e3dca67&_e=gZArcMtScGmaE5yVf7NjALcg_PFd9C_tIIJ59oPaWUEMM9kYCAKkOxxLRjfgz37i22fRmwMqNJ3xqx83B9o1YRdZlvRMYRVeOhd11E2g_ZP64mQRm_LRuYe7I6S4e-wX9CNUn990_B_d52hsWBCOncHJlsLFhM5QN_v1MrFh90wsHl4HDSSltreGpAXNXyXPHg1z663WPbG4goMIQZGTer7qhkSSq4gTMyTNQ-VKkPUbMCbH3TPcFl5FZyCW2TdI78_-gDRqM9hB9pfwv8wq2sRIM_yzBsKfww-e_vP18RoP7kf7HQLJ5qAGhE1btZ0eIuFR8Zz3dyWY1E4Hxkt4ylEspEJvpAtZgYRJsOx-uAcfEpmxaOqnG7fvDMY1RRUXNIXi48uxFrJ2g3tXTNT7aTQOXvGiOyxYuFR15VCGbIg%3D) |
