Friend,

**It’s officially 2020 — and today’s the kick off of the 2020 legislative session! Governor Holcomb and your legislators are ready to get rolling to deliver more results for Hoosiers.**
[ **Add your name and help us deliver results in 2020** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8e89f1d3486e412c843c19c74e3dca67&_e=gZArcMtScGmaE5yVf7NjALcg_PFd9C_tIIJ59oPaWUEMM9kYCAKkOxxLRjfgz37i22fRmwMqNJ3xqx83B9o1YRdZlvRMYRVeOhd11E2g_ZP64mQRm_LRuYe7I6S4e-wX9CNUn990_B_d52hsWBCOncHJlsLFhM5QN_v1MrFh90wsHl4HDSSltreGpAXNXyXPRAVCeALFvDGg9AFUXB_NDsS-SFI7Gg7dtcrNdSvezzyov-URetL7AuqvMtphWrT1nuRNLXNv3qSekPZLVIuif8lugU7L5W25tW8wJqEUczxez-KJgvnHVyx2y5O0NuNV57LBxuuhCQUuIbOut57Ylyl9BVatZYYrTWrEipj09ZWmdOjGtPNziBDhOh2Ay9UXJx-OaTY_2SOWFrmgR8ez8se8AIAjd3WqxXj-_tzzbLA%3D)
_Governor Holcomb has BIG goals for Indiana in 2020 through his Next Level Agenda, including: _
* Cutting down on distracted driving and making our roads safer for Hoosiers

* Lowering administrative burdens on teachers so they can do what they do best - teach our kids

* Providing healthcare transparency to consumers and protecting them from surprise health bills

* Helping employers provide workplace accommodations for pregnant women and making it easier to be a working mom in Indiana

* Incentivizing more community paramedicine programs, helping our EMS providers do much more than just transport patients

It’s all about improving the lives of Hoosiers with enhanced health, improved career opportunities, and an even better place to call home. Together, we know we can achieve these goals and much more by this time next year.

_We are 100% dedicated to helping ALL Hoosiers in all corners of our state — but we can’t do it alone. _

_**[As we start the 2020 legislative session today, we need your support to help build momentum for Governor Holcomb’s Next Level Agenda. Are you in?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8e89f1d3486e412c843c19c74e3dca67&_e=gZArcMtScGmaE5yVf7NjALcg_PFd9C_tIIJ59oPaWUEMM9kYCAKkOxxLRjfgz37i22fRmwMqNJ3xqx83B9o1YRdZlvRMYRVeOhd11E2g_ZP64mQRm_LRuYe7I6S4e-wX9CNUn990_B_d52hsWBCOncHJlsLFhM5QN_v1MrFh90wsHl4HDSSltreGpAXNXyXP_lPnt1j0dr9CGGq-POj1U5FP_nBkYVc1MYjSuqAn4LsZk5XQpARc1M2qmXN2kS6fndUFpeE0Kbt0dnTHp6dG_GvHM8uIFW8Ao6sI8mUkPo2PzOsrF_3bIuK4xSbxBTF3nGMMN9EYkNX9JdChZlJ16NZ2tu4ZRuJp5-721czr9xnwxA753lgsoQxj9XwPbbyCHdZ8zh-LzbY3O8wKQVlWPAhReJoNqG9lEwjN2H9vg2M%3D)**_
[ **Add your name and show your support for our 2020 Legislative Agenda** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8e89f1d3486e412c843c19c74e3dca67&_e=gZArcMtScGmaE5yVf7NjALcg_PFd9C_tIIJ59oPaWUEMM9kYCAKkOxxLRjfgz37i22fRmwMqNJ3xqx83B9o1YRdZlvRMYRVeOhd11E2g_ZP64mQRm_LRuYe7I6S4e-wX9CNUn990_B_d52hsWBCOncHJlsLFhM5QN_v1MrFh90wsHl4HDSSltreGpAXNXyXP-P-xM2vxw4-RRCTlhQaJ4syC6-jZmiPaDlXvtsLsXiE-D8Y0XnQ6Gf8sgzunMOqGAUJ5etftQ-bqHdjx_fTGi-4kdY-m_brfu_af0aD9-eGaUGrJRg6MB9tA_VQ7Qm8xTCOzRNGCQ6jjcvSB_3ocQeX-rrMQN4frbYnZwIw4GDCqZrOaD5EyvnbpsikkohJsr3dQW7RCE_4fRBf0P-QIi9xMAjI2ADV6MTVolWKQgt8%3D)

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: It’s in the Senate’s hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
Friends, impeachment is now in the hands of the Senate. | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=b9d2741e8e424f379cbc9bc4eb89b306&_e=0Jq_oMTGUWj3HeK_UvMGHOdZWbz69xCNfkmcCU-5nvsfGoRjyDRsfxOqqfyfAjVNeGDrbi2ggEh7O2Vd2n38py7xlRBxnS9vIE6a-b8B-CDRjW5Vx-rFORzir_fwrnu8awNJXI_W1uHD1wzMZ2jW4P0LZdenoNvmY-9xd54uovFAOxfPUyYKDYxVlxG_p0z5ElkpiM4UiAgOCEol-nxLsil5yMFr5Oxt7EU86WZS6CiEAMshxEr1C6EorQ32nkTLfwzu5UZUqr6Uod6dBo5As_atxJBGdogRW9sAWQ-WqTqZrBbpRBBPNS1fbKkDXeydbwww5VyCVlfwzL-xtNEm0XHanfmb2vAZT4LfCxibVoHw4ltGrswm-pZ3ivxYif33UZ0XSJFrFJ_CQHXAVSh33rR3hHuINoq-PlYdCYbiOWfRHejATBkC39CogsgE9VuY) Friends, impeachment is now in the hands of the Senate. I suspect that Mitch McConnell will do whatever he can to ensure the pursuit of truth and accountability will die at his hands. [**So, Montana needs to know -- how will Steve Daines vote? Sign my petition here if you want Senator Daines to vote to proceed with the impeachment hearing so we can hold those who abuse power accountable.**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=b9d2741e8e424f379cbc9bc4eb89b306&_e=0Jq_oMTGUWj3HeK_UvMGHOdZWbz69xCNfkmcCU-5nvsfGoRjyDRsfxOqqfyfAjVNeGDrbi2ggEh7O2Vd2n38py7xlRBxnS9vIE6a-b8B-CDRjW5Vx-rFORzir_fwrnu8awNJXI_W1uHD1wzMZ2jW4P0LZdenoNvmY-9xd54uovFAOxfPUyYKDYxVlxG_p0z5ElkpiM4UiAgOCEol-nxLsnzgWSEqp5Oik2U_nxBJF5SwQeCw9JOVo-pVMHzvzl7wGrYfxYifDmHxrQFgWsfLMXlE9Cs8VzHoKV889JVACbPhDVJ2KPDcqz6_Bs0QhOA3JxbdERuqlTK2F9pXBNNidPMIx-VoNx7jsUr7RhdViXycq8zXqxCK_SgSsZXDJkKcHsT7-m_3dEjVb7OtrZ5GO9x8kz-WbD1BwLgwyQeruvBkxXvXo12oByk1tIKQO7Ni) [Tell Steve Daines to vote YES](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=b9d2741e8e424f379cbc9bc4eb89b306&_e=0Jq_oMTGUWj3HeK_UvMGHOdZWbz69xCNfkmcCU-5nvsfGoRjyDRsfxOqqfyfAjVNeGDrbi2ggEh7O2Vd2n38py7xlRBxnS9vIE6a-b8B-CDRjW5Vx-rFORzir_fwrnu8awNJXI_W1uHD1wzMZ2jW4P0LZdenoNvmY-9xd54uovFAOxfPUyYKDYxVlxG_p0z5ElkpiM4UiAgOCEol-nxLsu-xFAY5RRtvwJBK2mRd8tf6m2jVw8_QgzswPX1mwC6PNHBL_w0dGEN2ZsnkdUHU36Igs7c746ea3Db7Mt7sSCbQWdRu5q8G-O6nhhxasnn-PTe6TC-i5bvfCaS6cNjUIbtUsE1kKdKgATZizsjviOx3R9c2OUXu4IZ20ION9Z6Zo3chikpKZYegSXpaTKzNiGYBm0R9h8wTSIwtgmHvu8XJMYL7vNli1swJ5In0E8sb) I fear that no matter what the American people want, Senator Daines will vote along with Trump and McConnell’s wishes. That’s why we need to remove him as soon as possible. Not only for the sanctity of our democracy but for the wellbeing of Montana. [**But we can still try and pressure Steve Daines into doing what his constituents want. So if you believe he should vote YES to proceed with the impeachment hearings, sign our petition today.**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=b9d2741e8e424f379cbc9bc4eb89b306&_e=0Jq_oMTGUWj3HeK_UvMGHOdZWbz69xCNfkmcCU-5nvsfGoRjyDRsfxOqqfyfAjVNeGDrbi2ggEh7O2Vd2n38py7xlRBxnS9vIE6a-b8B-CDRjW5Vx-rFORzir_fwrnu8awNJXI_W1uHD1wzMZ2jW4P0LZdenoNvmY-9xd54uovFAOxfPUyYKDYxVlxG_p0z5ElkpiM4UiAgOCEol-nxLsuVCzafpVYdKMJcqhYNP4b4Gc4QmRuOzqEzIbLUV5p9N0G6C6ARE2a19pVHNZLTn1T_OlXRjvJ2lk3lxGlp9hbCRGX01R-oH80JCDxwITa_KmBaNPfm2psBxMhsCpKMp4iFCvmLDs2dTOWEYmRhVsgu_K3I5lc45eLssT2-SLqM_FkV5D-Qbh5wS9MvowyRKTw-W50svjUQPIAleYiDnTXY_0INxLAk4tPFLC-uwGSeU) \-- Wilmot Collins [**P.S. If you’re as frustrated with the actions of our Senator as I am, donate to my campaign so I can travel to every corner of Montana visiting and listening to people, and ultimately defeat Mitch McConnell’s rubberstamp in the Senate.**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=b9d2741e8e424f379cbc9bc4eb89b306&_e=0Jq_oMTGUWj3HeK_UvMGHA7FKGbxk92Ek0SGr35_g0LBGQUwple2Q5UOK4nhfN1GqMTevVqvQKwtaTt8niZkidTRzukOF_bYFyNBZxmPqgGQ0WaKOQmU2lCxxF3EkO_P9e4ysWwZ55xgY_F2zj3tecTR2dmkV53-z2i8GC6J7J1EmYQb16UH-aB2jfGQ4N6xUKudWDayue6Df26safy4jSsJVb2Wqo3r7QM840x_byBovQWN7_tFn-4DHt3FYYzcmSK1sAUmWlUE4oiu-pGw0dKuzv5fxhhKBNiTxFLk7-3r0oUehfd0KmTilTnfjZ1Y_pzuLrHG5ozfZUVQkTG5pjK98woH1QrrftrnuEJW7IZMTBdrdZrV7f8jVQs12PZKaSqyaZvcYbTgtFiYyKAOy-o2WFwiHH_A9qARNhRmeiJiW9PwdvKJDHjtoE3n2Vmy_3wobZHopcl9ZJ04QY6CsjYcTwaKVHdaaDyRLDfFqUk%3D)

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year U.S. military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. As Montana’s next Senator, Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, job creation and economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. name: Team Charles Booker
subject: We’re blown away.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOOKER FOR KENTUCKY
body:
|
---

name: Susan Collins
subject: Thank you for an incredible year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Your support over the past few months has been absolutely incredible. From your generous contributions to your standing by me through the vicious attacks from the Left -- I am so grateful for you.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE0ODM0MTAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MDU4MTM2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_****_
Dear Peter,
Your support over the past few months has been absolutely incredible. From your generous contributions to your standing by me through the vicious attacks from the Left -- _**I am so grateful for you.**_
As we enter 2020, we must be prepared for the campaign ahead. This next year will not be easy. The false attacks will only increase with intensity, and the dark money donors will continue funneling millions into Maine's election.
This fight is ours to win, Peter. I have faith we will prevail in November. **But I need you to stay with me.**
I am so grateful to have you on my team. Thank you for all that you do!
All my best,

name: Brandon Hegar
subject: Hi, I'm Brandon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
You've all heard about MJ, the Texas tough, ass-kicking, motorcycle-riding combat veteran fighting for a Senate seat. I wanted to take a minute to share the MJ I know best -- the fiercely protective y

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907d8/7f51f7bc/4adcb87e/4ef02127/3173889557/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

You've all heard about MJ, the Texas tough, ass-kicking, motorcycle-riding combat veteran fighting for a Senate seat. But as MJ's husband, I wanted to take a minute to share the MJ I know best -- the fiercely protective yet warm, caring mama bear to our boys.

**[I want to tell you more, but first I have to ask -- will you pitch in to MJ's campaign for U.S. Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907d8/7f51f7bc/4adcb87e/4ef02126/3173889557/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200106.2nd__722__&amount=10&recurring=true") We're just eight weeks from the Texas Democratic primary, and we have to keep moving full steam ahead.**

It's not easy to juggle raising two kids while running for office, especially in a state as big as Texas. MJ loves campaigning, but she'll be the first to tell you that her very favorite moments are those spent with our kids. After all, they're the reason she's in this race. She's dead-set on building a better future for them, and MJ doesn't do anything half-assed.

I know from how she looks out for our kids that she's exactly who you'd want to look out for your own kids -- or any of your loved ones -- in the Senate. We just have to get her there. [**So, can you pitch in to help her build the campaign that will beat John Cornyn in November?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907d8/7f51f7bc/4adcb87e/4ef02126/3173889557/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200106.2nd__722__&amount=10&recurring=true")

On a recent morning before the day's campaigning kicked off, MJ and the boys bounced an oversized rainbow slinky down the stairs. Ever the pragmatist, MJ carefully calculated the arc to just the right height, maximizing velocity and the number of flips to create the ultimate awe factor, which our boys spent the next hour trying to replicate as she patiently guided them.

Later, before she went onstage at a campaign stop, MJ zipped by me in a blur, chased by our two tiny toddlers engaged in a high stakes game of tag. Winner gets all the kisses and the loser gets all the tickles. As MJ shared her powerful speech about her military service and her vision for a better future for Texas with the crowd, the boys clung to her legs -- she's still just mom to them!

In moments like those, I'm reminded MJ is one hell of a mother and partner -- and it's days like this one on the trail that convince the Texans she meets that we need her in the Senate to be a hell of a fighter for us. But she needs all of us to step up and help along the way. [**Will you chip in to help get her there?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907d8/7f51f7bc/4adcb87e/4ef02126/3173889557/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200106.2nd__722__&amount=10&recurring=true")

Thanks for everything,

Brandon Hegar (MJ's husband)

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907d8/7f51f7bc/4adcb87e/4ef02126/3173889557/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200106.2nd__722__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---

|
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

subject: We have to keep up our momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hi Team,

We hit a huge goal - raising $400,000 of the $700,000 we need to stay competitive in New Hampshire.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba874/134673f2/8cab91e/69976095/1208109765/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
We're so close, but we don't have much time left!

[If we can't reach our goal by January 16th (next Thursday!), we won't have the resources we need to keep knocking doors and airing our ads at the level required to compete.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba874/134673f2/8cab91e/69976095/1208109765/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

subject: I'm proud to endorse Elizabeth Warren for president of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'm so proud of the campaign we built -- fighting for the most vulnerable people, standing up for immigrants and people who are poor, and working towards... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9ea/45c30650/1e9d26183/66fc23f8/3863136913/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
When I suspended my campaign for president, I said that I wasn't done fighting for what I believe in.

I'm so proud of the campaign we built -- fighting for the most vulnerable people, standing up for immigrants and people who are poor, and working towards an America where everyone counts.

The American people need a champion in Washington who will be a president for everyone. Someone who's unafraid to fight like hell to make the big changes we need in the years ahead.

**[That's why today I'm proud to endorse Senator Elizabeth Warren for president of the United States. If you can, chip in today to say you're ready to fight alongside me and Elizabeth for a better future.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9ea/45c30650/1e9d26183/66fc23fb/3863136913/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjI1Rl9BTk5fRU5EX1NfMjAyMDAxMDZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN25F_ANN_END_S_20200106_V1S2_P")**
| _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

| | [DONATE NOW: $100](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9ea/45c30650/1e9d26183/66fc23d1/3863136913/VEsEAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjI1Rl9BTk5fRU5EX1NfMjAyMDAxMDZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EMN25F_ANN_END_S_20200106_V1S2_P")

| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9ea/45c30650/1e9d26183/66fc23fb/3863136913/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjI1Rl9BTk5fRU5EX1NfMjAyMDAxMDZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN25F_ANN_END_S_20200106_V1S2_P")
---
>
Elizabeth and I share a bold vision for the future -- an America where no matter who you are or where you live, you can find good housing, your kids can get a good education, and you can have good job opportunities.

I've seen firsthand her commitment to this vision. We both served in the Obama administration, we worked alongside one another to boost housing opportunity while I was at HUD, and I've been so impressed with how hardworking and groundbreaking her campaign has been.

Elizabeth knows that big change doesn't come by playing it safe or doing it alone.

We need a grassroots movement to take on the special interests in Washington, and a president who will push for big, structural change.

Elizabeth has a plan for that, and I'm ready to join her to get it done. **[But making Washington work for working people is going to take a grassroots movement. Please chip in $2 or whatever you can today to make a difference in these critical final weeks before caucusing and voting starts. Side by side, we'll fight from the heart.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9ea/45c30650/1e9d26183/66fc23fb/3863136913/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjI1Rl9BTk5fRU5EX1NfMjAyMDAxMDZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN25F_ANN_END_S_20200106_V1S2_P")**

My grandmother came here as an orphan from Mexico when she was seven-years-old. She worked her entire life as a maid, a cook, and a babysitter to provide for her family -- and just two generations later, one of her grandsons is a Congressman, and I was a candidate for president of the United States. That's the promise of America.

Elizabeth will fight for that promise because she's lived the American Dream. She grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class in Oklahoma. She's the daughter of a janitor, and she went on to become a public school teacher, law professor, public servant, a U.S. Senator, and she's the best person to be the next president.

Both of us were blessed with the kind of opportunity we've had because we worked hard, our families worked hard, and because our country gave us a shot to succeed.

There's one candidate who I believe will make sure that shot is available to everybody in this country -- that's Elizabeth Warren. And I'm asking you to believe in her too.

**[If you're still willing to fight for a president who understands the struggles everyday Americans face, for a president who isn't afraid to take on the tough issues, for a president who will put people first, then I hope you'll consider making a contribution of $2 or whatever you can today.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b9ea/45c30650/1e9d26183/66fc23fb/3863136913/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjI1Rl9BTk5fRU5EX1NfMjAyMDAxMDZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN25F_ANN_END_S_20200106_V1S2_P")**

Our fight for the future has just begun.

¡Juntos ganaremos! Together, we will win!

For the Future,
Julian
